claim_boundaries: M41 is not a velocity-curve fit; it is a formation-state surface proposal.
The formation-state surface asks when baryonic organization activates reservoir response, not whether a curve can be fitted.
Measurement uncertainty penalty remains separate from physical reservoir-disorder suppression.
Existing scalar rotation-curve tables are insufficient to identify onset without H I, SFR, SFE, depletion, coherence, and endpoint-quality labels.
UGC07125-like cases are observational tests, not proof objects or clean juvenile prototypes.
No mature velocity law changed; M36 remains the mature saturated endpoint reference.
